title: selaginella rupestris var. sartorii
intro: Selaginella rupestris var. sartorii, also known as 'Mountain Moss', is a rare, terrestrial species of the Selaginella genus, a group of small, non-vascular plants commonly known as spikemoss. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella rupestris var. sartorii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an antioxidant, potentially reducing the risk of certain diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as an infusion or decoction, and it is also used as a component in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
